logs.message: WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Design contains AXI ports. Reset is fixed to synchronous and active low.
WARNING: [HLS 207-5551] Invalid function level interface port in '#pragma HLS interface': expect 'return' (streamToData/streamToData.cpp:20:41)
WARNING: [HLS 207-5551] Invalid function level interface port in '#pragma HLS interface': expect 'return' (streamToData/streamToData.cpp:19:41)
